name: Cajun Rice- Key Gourmet
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned tomatoes and reserve the liquid.
2. Add enough water to the tomato liquid to make 1 1/2 cups total.
3. Chop the reserved tomatoes and set aside.
4. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Sauté the onions, bell pepper, and garlic until soft.
5. Add the rice, thyme, oregano, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper to the skillet. Stir well.
6. Cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
7. Pour in the reserved tomato liquid and bring to a boil.
8. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until all liquid is absorbed, about 25 minutes.
9. Remove from heat and let stand covered for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Fluff with a fork before serving.
